proposed_entries.title: Pause Ops dashboard implementation pending per-page-type design research
proposed_entries.body: On 2026-05-06 the Ops dashboard MVP was paused (checkpoint_complete) after the user reframed FAMtastic as a creation platform. Resume only after plan_2026_05_05_workbench_per_page_design lands its taxonomy + canvas + chrome briefs.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: type 'decision' not in allowlist {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern}
